# SharonCraft

> Handmade beadwork, Kenyan gifts, and African-inspired decor with WhatsApp-first ordering in Kenya.

SharonCraft is a Nairobi-based handmade brand focused on beadwork, gift-ready pieces, and home decor. It was founded by Kelvin Mark at 21, and he continues to lead the brand as Founder and CEO. Customers usually browse the website first, then use WhatsApp to confirm product fit, customization, delivery, and payment details.

## Shop

- [Homepage](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/): Main entry page for featured products, shopping paths, trust signals, and discovery links.
- [Shop](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/shop.html): Full product catalog of handmade beadwork, gifts, and decor.
- [Handmade Kenyan Gifts](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/handmade-kenyan-gifts.html): Gift-focused shopping path.
- [African Home Decor Nairobi](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/african-home-decor-nairobi.html): Decor-focused page.
- [Maasai Jewelry Kenya](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/maasai-jewelry-kenya.html): Jewelry-focused page.
- [Kenyan Artifacts](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/kenyan-artifacts.html): Culture-inspired decor and gift pieces.

## Trust

- [Why Trust SharonCraft](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/why-trust-sharoncraft.html): Handmade identity, support, and visible trust signals.
- [About](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/about.html): Brand background and cultural inspiration.
- [Contact](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/contact.html): Contact details and ordering help.
- [Returns](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/returns.html): Returns and refund policy.
- [Privacy](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/privacy.html): Privacy details.
- [Terms](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/terms.html): Terms and ordering conditions.

## Guides

- [Where To Buy Kenyan Artifacts](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/articles/where-to-buy-kenyan-artifacts.html): Buyer guide for artifacts and decor.
- [How To Style Beaded Home Decor](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/articles/how-to-style-beaded-home-decor.html): Decor styling guide.
- [How To Choose Maasai Jewelry](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/articles/how-to-choose-maasai-jewelry.html): Jewelry buying guide.
- [History of Maasai Beadwork](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/articles/history-of-maasai-beadwork.html): Cultural background and beadwork meaning.

## Ordering

- Primary support path: WhatsApp-first ordering and pre-purchase questions.
- Primary payment method in Kenya: M-Pesa support when available.
- Service area: Kenya.
- Business location: Nairobi, Kenya.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages.
- [Merchant Feed](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/google-merchant-feed.xml): Product feed for merchant systems.
